<type>file</type>
<content>
1: #!/usr/bin/env python3
2: """Extract an activation free-energy barrier and compute a TST rate constant."""
3: from __future__ import annotations
4: 
5: import argparse
6: import csv
7: import math
8: import sys
9: from pathlib import Path
10: from typing import Sequence
11: 
12: KB_J_PER_K = 1.380649e-23
13: H_J_S = 6.62607015e-34
14: HARTREE_J = 4.3597447222071e-18
15: EV_J = 1.602176634e-19
16: AVOGADRO = 6.02214076e23
17: 
18: FIELDNAMES = [
19:     "elementary_step", "dataset_label", "temperature_K", "deltaF_dagger_au",
20:     "reactant_rc_au", "transition_state_rc_au",
21:     "reactant_free_energy", "transition_state_free_energy",
22:     "prefactor_model", "prefactor_expression", "prefactor_inputs",
23:     "prefactor_units", "prefactor_value", "rate_units", "rate_value",
24:     "barrier_source", "notes",
25: ]
26: 
27: 
28: def build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
29:     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Compute one TST rate from a free-energy profile or explicit barrier.")
30:     parser.add_argument("--input", help="free_energy_profile.csv. Required unless --deltaF is provided.")
31:     parser.add_argument("--output", default="tst_rates.csv", help="CSV file to create or append to.")
32:     parser.add_argument("--elementary-step", required=True, help="Elementary-step label for the rate.")
33:     parser.add_argument("--dataset-label", required=True, help="Dataset label to select and write.")
34:     parser.add_argument("--rc-index", type=int, default=0, help="Reaction-coordinate index. Default: 0.")
35:     parser.add_argument("--temperature", type=float, required=True, help="Temperature in K.")
36:     parser.add_argument("--free-energy-column", default="free_energy_au", help="Free-energy column in profile CSV. Default: free_energy_au. Use free_energy_converted only with a matching converted-unit column.")
37:     parser.add_argument("--free-energy-unit", choices=["auto", "au", "hartree", "eV", "kJ/mol", "kcal/mol"], default="auto", help="Unit of free-energy values. Default: auto from CSV free_energy_unit column, else au.")
38:     parser.add_argument("--reactant-mode", choices=["first", "last", "min", "rc", "value"], default="first", help="How to choose reactant/reference free energy. Default: first row after filtering.")
39:     parser.add_argument("--reactant-rc", type=float, default=None, help="Reactant reaction coordinate for --reactant-mode rc.")
40:     parser.add_argument("--reactant-value", type=float, default=None, help="Reactant free energy for --reactant-mode value, in --free-energy-unit.")
41:     parser.add_argument("--ts-mode", choices=["max", "rc", "value"], default="max", help="How to choose transition-state free energy. Default: max of selected profile.")
42:     parser.add_argument("--ts-rc", type=float, default=None, help="Transition-state reaction coordinate for --ts-mode rc.")
43:     parser.add_argument("--ts-value", type=float, default=None, help="Transition-state free energy for --ts-mode value, in --free-energy-unit.")
44:     parser.add_argument("--deltaF", type=float, default=None, help="Explicit activation free energy. If set, profile extraction is skipped.")
45:     parser.add_argument("--deltaF-unit", choices=["au", "hartree", "eV", "kJ/mol", "kcal/mol"], default=None, help="Unit for --deltaF. Required with --deltaF.")
46:     parser.add_argument("--prefactor-model", choices=["kBT_over_h", "custom_numeric", "adsorption_flux_n_v_S"], default="kBT_over_h", help="Prefactor model. Default: kBT_over_h.")
47:     parser.add_argument("--prefactor-value", type=float, default=None, help="Numeric prefactor for custom_numeric.")
48:     parser.add_argument("--prefactor-units", default="s^-1", help="Prefactor/rate units label. Default: s^-1.")
49:     parser.add_argument("--density", type=float, default=None, help="n for adsorption_flux_n_v_S.")
50:     parser.add_argument("--mean-speed", type=float, default=None, help="v for adsorption_flux_n_v_S.")
51:     parser.add_argument("--site-area", type=float, default=None, help="S for adsorption_flux_n_v_S.")
52:     parser.add_argument("--notes", default="", help="Notes to preserve in the output CSV.")
53:     parser.add_argument("--confirm-parameters", action="store_true", help="Required confirmation of barrier extraction, units, prefactor model, and rate interpretation.")
54:     parser.add_argument("--print-defaults", action="store_true", help="Print default assumptions and exit.")
55:     return parser
56: 
57: 
58: def print_defaults() -> None:
59:     print("Default assumptions requiring user confirmation:")
60:     print("  rc_index: 0")
61:     print("  reactant_mode: first (default initial state is the first point in the chosen free-energy profile)")
62:     print("  ts_mode: max (default transition state is the highest free-energy point)")
63:     print("  free_energy_unit: auto uses au for free_energy_au, free_energy_converted_unit for free_energy_converted, else CSV free_energy_unit or au")
64:     print("  prefactor_model: kBT_over_h")
65:     print("  rate formula: k = prefactor * exp(-DeltaF_dagger / (k_B T))")
66:     print("  custom/adsorption prefactors require user-provided units and inputs")
67: 
68: 
69: def unit_to_joule(value: float, unit: str) -> float:
70:     if unit in ("au", "hartree"):
71:         return value * HARTREE_J
72:     if unit == "eV":
73:         return value * EV_J
74:     if unit == "kJ/mol":
75:         return value * 1000.0 / AVOGADRO
76:     if unit == "kcal/mol":
77:         return value * 4184.0 / AVOGADRO
78:     raise ValueError(f"Unsupported unit: {unit}")
79: 
80: 
81: def joule_to_hartree(value_j: float) -> float:
82:     return value_j / HARTREE_J
83: 
84: 
85: def read_profile(path: Path, dataset_label: str, rc_index: int, free_energy_column: str, unit_arg: str) -> tuple[list[dict[str, str]], str]:
86:     with path.open("r", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
87:         reader = csv.DictReader(handle)
88:         if reader.fieldnames is None:
89:             raise ValueError("Input CSV has no header")
90:         required = ["dataset_label", "rc_index", "reaction_coordinate_au", free_energy_column]
91:         missing = [col for col in required if col not in reader.fieldnames]
92:         if missing:
93:             raise ValueError(f"Input CSV is missing columns: {missing}")
94:         rows = [row for row in reader if row["dataset_label"] == dataset_label and int(row["rc_index"]) == rc_index]
95:     if not rows:
96:         raise ValueError("No rows matched dataset label and rc index")
97:     if unit_arg != "auto":
98:         unit = unit_arg
99:     elif free_energy_column == "free_energy_au":
100:         unit = "au"
101:     elif free_energy_column == "free_energy_converted" and "free_energy_converted_unit" in rows[0] and rows[0].get("free_energy_converted_unit"):
102:         unit = rows[0]["free_energy_converted_unit"]
103:     elif "free_energy_unit" in rows[0] and rows[0].get("free_energy_unit"):
104:         unit = rows[0]["free_energy_unit"]
105:     else:
106:         unit = "au"
107:     if unit == "hartree":
108:         unit = "au"
109:     return rows, unit
110: 
111: 
112: def closest_by_rc(rows: list[dict[str, str]], rc: float) -> dict[str, str]:
113:     return min(rows, key=lambda row: abs(float(row["reaction_coordinate_au"]) - rc))
114: 
115: 
116: def select_value(rows: list[dict[str, str]], mode: str, column: str, rc: float | None, explicit: float | None, label: str) -> tuple[float, str]:
117:     if mode == "first":
118:         row = rows[0]
119:         return float(row[column]), row["reaction_coordinate_au"], f"{label}=first(rc={row['reaction_coordinate_au']})"
120:     if mode == "last":
121:         row = rows[-1]
122:         return float(row[column]), row["reaction_coordinate_au"], f"{label}=last(rc={row['reaction_coordinate_au']})"
123:     if mode == "min":
124:         row = min(rows, key=lambda r: float(r[column]))
125:         return float(row[column]), row["reaction_coordinate_au"], f"{label}=min(rc={row['reaction_coordinate_au']})"
126:     if mode == "max":
127:         row = max(rows, key=lambda r: float(r[column]))
128:         return float(row[column]), row["reaction_coordinate_au"], f"{label}=max(rc={row['reaction_coordinate_au']})"
129:     if mode == "rc":
130:         if rc is None:
131:             raise ValueError(f"--{label}-rc is required for --{label}-mode rc")
132:         row = closest_by_rc(rows, rc)
133:         return float(row[column]), row["reaction_coordinate_au"], f"{label}=closest_rc(requested={rc}, used={row['reaction_coordinate_au']})"
134:     if mode == "value":
135:         if explicit is None:
136:             raise ValueError(f"--{label}-value is required for --{label}-mode value")
137:         return explicit, "TODO_EXPLICIT_VALUE_NO_RC", f"{label}=explicit_value"
138:     raise ValueError(mode)
139: 
140: 
141: def prefactor(args: argparse.Namespace) -> tuple[float, str, str]:
142:     if args.prefactor_model == "kBT_over_h":
143:         value = KB_J_PER_K * args.temperature / H_J_S
144:         return value, "k_B*T/h", f"T={args.temperature} K"
145:     if args.prefactor_model == "custom_numeric":
146:         if args.prefactor_value is None:
147:             raise ValueError("--prefactor-value is required for custom_numeric")
148:         return args.prefactor_value, "custom_numeric", "prefactor_value=user_provided"
149:     if args.prefactor_model == "adsorption_flux_n_v_S":
150:         if args.density is None or args.mean_speed is None or args.site_area is None:
151:             raise ValueError("--density, --mean-speed, and --site-area are required for adsorption_flux_n_v_S")
152:         value = args.density * args.mean_speed * args.site_area
153:         return value, "n*v*S", f"n={args.density}; v={args.mean_speed}; S={args.site_area}"
154:     raise ValueError(args.prefactor_model)
155: 
156: 
157: def append_row(path: Path, row: dict[str, str]) -> None:
158:     path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
159:     write_header = not path.exists() or path.stat().st_size == 0
160:     with path.open("a", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
161:         writer = csv.DictWriter(handle, fieldnames=FIELDNAMES)
162:         if write_header:
163:             writer.writeheader()
164:         writer.writerow(row)
165: 
166: 
167: def main(argv: Sequence[str] | None = None) -> int:
168:     parser = build_parser()
169:     args = parser.parse_args(argv)
170:     if args.print_defaults:
171:         print_defaults()
172:         return 0
173:     if not args.confirm_parameters:
174:         print_defaults()
175:         print("\nRefusing to compute TST rate until --confirm-parameters is supplied.", file=sys.stderr)
176:         return 2
177:     if args.deltaF is not None:
178:         if args.deltaF_unit is None:
179:             raise ValueError("--deltaF-unit is required with --deltaF")
180:         delta_j = unit_to_joule(args.deltaF, args.deltaF_unit)
181:         delta_au = joule_to_hartree(delta_j)
182:         barrier_source = f"explicit_deltaF={args.deltaF} {args.deltaF_unit}"
183:         reactant = float("nan")
184:         ts = float("nan")
185:         reactant_rc = "TODO_EXPLICIT_DELTAF_NO_REACTANT_RC"
186:         ts_rc = "TODO_EXPLICIT_DELTAF_NO_TS_RC"
187:     else:
188:         if args.input is None:
189:             raise ValueError("--input is required unless --deltaF is supplied")
190:         rows, unit = read_profile(Path(args.input), args.dataset_label, args.rc_index, args.free_energy_column, args.free_energy_unit)
191:         reactant, reactant_rc, reactant_src = select_value(rows, args.reactant_mode, args.free_energy_column, args.reactant_rc, args.reactant_value, "reactant")
192:         ts, ts_rc, ts_src = select_value(rows, args.ts_mode, args.free_energy_column, args.ts_rc, args.ts_value, "ts")
193:         delta_value = ts - reactant
194:         delta_j = unit_to_joule(delta_value, unit)
195:         delta_au = joule_to_hartree(delta_j)
196:         barrier_source = f"{args.input}; {reactant_src}; {ts_src}; unit={unit}"
197:     if delta_j < 0:
198:         raise ValueError("Computed activation free energy is negative; confirm reactant/TS selection and sign convention")
199:     pref_value, pref_expr, pref_inputs = prefactor(args)
200:     rate = pref_value * math.exp(-delta_j / (KB_J_PER_K * args.temperature))
201:     row = {
202:         "elementary_step": args.elementary_step,
203:         "dataset_label": args.dataset_label,
204:         "temperature_K": f"{args.temperature:.12g}",
205:         "deltaF_dagger_au": f"{delta_au:.12g}",
206:         "reactant_rc_au": str(reactant_rc),
207:         "transition_state_rc_au": str(ts_rc),
208:         "reactant_free_energy": f"{reactant:.12g}",
209:         "transition_state_free_energy": f"{ts:.12g}",
210:         "prefactor_model": args.prefactor_model,
211:         "prefactor_expression": pref_expr,
212:         "prefactor_inputs": pref_inputs,
213:         "prefactor_units": args.prefactor_units,
214:         "prefactor_value": f"{pref_value:.12g}",
215:         "rate_units": args.prefactor_units,
216:         "rate_value": f"{rate:.12g}",
217:         "barrier_source": barrier_source,
218:         "notes": args.notes,
219:     }
220:     append_row(Path(args.output), row)
221:     print(f"Selected reactant RC: {reactant_rc}; transition-state RC: {ts_rc}")
222:     print("Ask the user to confirm these states before treating the rate as final.")
223:     print(f"Wrote one TST rate row to {args.output}")
224:     return 0
225: 
226: 
227: if __name__ == "__main__":
228:     raise SystemExit(main())

(End of file - total 228 lines)
